name: Nico
quote: 'When it comes to bills, you'd see him on the top of the leaderboard' - Archie, definitely
bio:
Nico is an Arctic fox, and one of the main characters in the series. Most of the time, He appears with a generic loose shirt and shorts, but in other media He is more often drawn in a jacket. While living in the main house, He almost always stays near air conditioner due to his nature as an arctic fox.

will add more stuff later :P
